content: Payment reform progression moves from volume to value: (1) DRG refinement - adding complication/comorbidity tiers, outcome adjustments; (2) Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program - penalties for excess readmissions (CMS reduced payments by up to 3% for high readmission rates); (3) Hospital Value-Based Purchasing - tying 2% of Medicare payments to quality scores; (4) Bundled Payment for Care Improvement (BPCI) - voluntary programs for joint replacement, cardiac surgery showing 5-10% savings without quality deterioration; (5) Accountable Care Organizations (ACOs) - shared savings if spending below benchmark with quality targets met. Medicare ACOs achieved $2.4 billion savings in 2022 while improving quality metrics.
